name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures advanced Java knowledge including concurrency, JVM internals, and performance tuning for senior developers.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: Comprehensive personality assessment measuring 32 workplace behavior dimensions including leadership, teamwork, and problem-solving styles.

name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
description: Adaptive general reasoning test covering inductive, numerical, and deductive reasoning for graduate and professional roles.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: Situational judgment test designed for graduate-level candidates measuring workplace decision-making and problem-solving.

name: Smart Interview Live Coding
description: Live coding interview platform for technical screening allowing real-time assessment of programming skills.
